meta.title: Snowtrack Alternative — Keeply
meta.description: Perforce acquired Snowtrack in March 2025 and rebranded it as P4 One with enterprise pricing. Keeply picks up where Snowtrack left off — visual version control for creative files, no Git knowledge needed.

hero.badge: ⚡ TIME-SENSITIVE · Perforce acquired Snowtrack in March 2025
hero.sub_html: Perforce acquired Snowtrack in March 2025 and rebranded it as P4 One with enterprise pricing. Keeply picks up where Snowtrack left off — visual version control for creative files, no Git knowledge needed.
hero.tagline: Windows · macOS · Free forever tier available.

what_happened.title: What happened to Snowtrack?
what_happened.body_html: Perforce acquired Snowtrack in March 2025 and rebranded the product as P4 One. The standalone Snowtrack app is no longer available — new customers must subscribe to Perforce's enterprise licensing starting at roughly $19 per seat per month, with the product now positioned as part of the Helix version-control ecosystem rather than a lightweight tool for independent creators.
what_happened.source: Sources: Perforce press release (March 6, 2025) · P4 One pricing page

rows.keeply: Free forever · Team $25/mo flat (coming soon) · $599 Perpetual Founding Member (limited 500)

pain_points.title: Enterprise pricing.
pain_points.body: P4 One starts at roughly $19 per seat per month, pricing out solo artists and small studios who used Snowtrack for free.

pain_points.title: Mandatory Perforce account + SSO.
pain_points.body: New licenses require signing up for Perforce's auth system — not friendly to creators who just want to manage their Figma or Blender files.

pain_points.title: Helix Server dependency.
pain_points.body: The P4 One workflow is built around a central Helix Server — enterprise infrastructure that's overkill for a freelancer or a 3-person studio.

pain_points.title: Your files locked in a server.
pain_points.body: P4 One stores versions inside Helix; you can't just browse your NAS and see your project files. Keeply keeps everything as regular files you can open in Explorer or Finder.

pain_points.title: Lost the lightweight-creative feel.
pain_points.body: P4 One's roadmap clearly leans toward large studios, away from the independent-creator sweet spot Snowtrack used to occupy.

migration.title: Export your Snowtrack history while you still can
migration.body: If your Snowtrack install still works, browse to your project folder and copy out the full .snowtrack/ directory to an external drive. Keep the legacy history as a read-only archive.

migration.title: Install Keeply and point it at your project folder
migration.body: Download Keeply, open your project folder, and click Start protecting. Keeply begins versioning from the current state — fresh history, same files, no migration tool required.

migration.title: Pick a backup location (NAS / USB / Gitea / GitHub)
migration.body: In Keeply → Backup Locations, add one of: local folder, USB drive, NAS (SMB path), self-hosted Gitea, or a GitHub repo. Keeply syncs there automatically on every save — no central server required.

faq.a: Perforce acquired Snowtrack in March 2025 and rebranded it as P4 One. The original standalone product is no longer sold — new licenses require a Perforce Helix Server subscription with enterprise pricing starting around $19 per seat per month.

Yes — the shipping product is free forever for personal use. Core features including unlimited version history, visual diff, file comparison, notes, and backup to one location are free. A Team plan with admin controls and multi-location sync is in active development. A $599 perpetual Founding Member license (500 seats) buys lifetime access to all future Team features when they ship.

faq.q: Do I need Git knowledge to use Keeply?
faq.a: No. Keeply is designed specifically for creators who don't want to think about Git — it's a firm product principle that zero Git terminology appears in the interface. Actions use office-friendly language: Save a version, Browse history, Restore to this point, Compare versions. No commits, branches, or merges to learn.

faq.q: Can Keeply handle large files like 3D, video, or Blender projects?
faq.a: Yes, and you don't configure anything. Keeply automatically detects 38 binary file formats (Blender, PSD, video, 3D, archives) plus any file over 10 MB, then routes them through large-file storage silently. Repository sizes stay manageable; you never see the Git LFS setup dance that other tools expose.

faq.q: What file types get visual side-by-side diff?
faq.a: Keeply renders true visual diffs for Microsoft Office documents (Word .docx, Excel .xlsx, PowerPoint .pptx), PDFs, and raster images (PNG / JPG / WebP). You see two versions side by side with highlighted changes — not just a list of modified bytes. For all other file types, Keeply tracks the version and lets you restore any point.

faq.q: Where does my data actually live?
faq.a: Your project files stay on your computer, and backup copies go to one of five self-hosted locations you choose: a local folder, USB drive, NAS (SMB path), self-hosted Gitea, or a GitHub repository. Keeply runs no servers that touch your project data — we only receive a hashed device identifier during license validation.

meta.title: Snowtrack 替代方案 — Keeply
meta.description: Perforce 在 2025 年 3 月收購 Snowtrack 並改為 P4 One 企業訂閱制。Keeply 接手獨立創作者的需求——視覺化檔案版本管理，不用學 Git。

hero.h1_html: 在找 Snowtrack 替代方案？
hero.sub_html: Perforce 在 2025 年 3 月收購 Snowtrack 並改為 P4 One 企業訂閱制。Keeply 接手 Snowtrack 留下的空缺——視覺化檔案版本管理，不用學 Git。
hero.tagline: 支援 Windows / macOS，永久免費版可用。

what_happened.title: Snowtrack 發生什麼事？
what_happened.body_html: Perforce 在 2025 年 3 月收購了 Snowtrack，並把產品改名為 P4 One。獨立版 Snowtrack 不再販售——新客戶必須訂閱 Perforce 的企業版授權，最低約 每人每月 $19 美金，產品定位從獨立創作者工具轉為 Helix 版本控制生態系的一環。
what_happened.source: 資料來源：Perforce 2025 年 3 月 6 日公告 · P4 One 定價頁

pain_points.title: 企業級定價。
pain_points.body: P4 One 起價約每人每月 $19 美金，把 Snowtrack 過去服務的獨立藝術家和小型工作室擠出市場。

pain_points.title: 強制 Perforce 帳號 + SSO。
pain_points.body: 新授權需要註冊 Perforce 認證系統——對只想管 Figma 或 Blender 檔案的創作者很不友善。

pain_points.title: 依賴 Helix Server。
pain_points.body: P4 One 工作流必須建立在中央 Helix Server 上——這種企業基礎設施對自由工作者或 3 人工作室是殺雞用牛刀。

pain_points.title: 檔案被鎖在伺服器裡。
pain_points.body: P4 One 把版本存在 Helix 裡，你不能直接打開 NAS 用檔案總管看你的專案。Keeply 讓所有檔案維持成普通檔案，用 Finder 或檔案總管就看得到。

pain_points.title: 失去「輕量創作」的精神。
pain_points.body: P4 One 的路線圖明顯轉向大型工作室，離 Snowtrack 過去服務的獨立創作者族群越來越遠。

migration.title: 趁還能用的時候匯出 Snowtrack 歷史
migration.body: 如果你的 Snowtrack 還能開，打開你的專案資料夾，把 .snowtrack/ 整個目錄複製到外接硬碟。把舊版本歷史當唯讀封存保留。

migration.title: 安裝 Keeply 並指向你的專案資料夾
migration.body: 下載 Keeply、打開你的專案資料夾、點「開始保護」。Keeply 從目前狀態開始記錄版本——新的版本歷史、同樣的檔案、不需要任何轉換工具。

migration.title: 選一個備份位置（NAS / 隨身碟 / Gitea / GitHub）
migration.body: 在 Keeply → 備份位置新增一個：本機資料夾、隨身碟、NAS（SMB 路徑）、自架 Gitea、或 GitHub repo。每次存檔 Keeply 都會自動同步到那邊——不需要中央伺服器。

faq.a: Perforce 在 2025 年 3 月收購 Snowtrack 並改名為 P4 One。獨立版 Snowtrack 不再販售——新授權必須訂閱 Perforce Helix Server，企業方案起價約每人每月 $19 美金。獨立創作者被迫尋找替代品。
是的，出貨版對個人永久免費。核心功能包括無限版本歷史、視覺比對、檔案差異、版本筆記、單一位置備份都免費。Team 方案（含管理控制與多位置同步）正在積極開發中。$599 永久授權 Founding Member（限 500 套）一次購買即可永久使用未來所有 Team 功能。

faq.q: 使用 Keeply 需要懂 Git 嗎？
faq.a: 不需要。Keeply 專為不想碰 Git 的創作者設計——「介面零 Git 術語」是我們堅守的產品原則。操作名稱用辦公室語言：儲存版本、瀏覽歷史、回復到此版本、比較版本。沒有 commit、branch、merge 要學。

faq.q: Keeply 能處理大檔案嗎？像 3D、影片、Blender 專案？
faq.a: 可以，而且完全不用設定。Keeply 自動偵測 38 種二進位格式（Blender、PSD、影片、3D、壓縮檔等）加上任何超過 10 MB 的檔案，把它們靜默轉到大檔儲存通道。repo 不會膨脹；也不會看到別的工具讓你搞 LFS 設定那一套。

faq.q: 哪些檔案類型能看到並排視覺比對？
faq.a: Keeply 對 Microsoft Office 文件（Word .docx、Excel .xlsx、PowerPoint .pptx）、PDF、點陣圖（PNG / JPG / WebP）都能產生真正的視覺比對。你會看到兩個版本並排、差異高亮——不是只看一串改過的 byte。其他檔案類型仍可追蹤版本，隨時回復任一時間點。

faq.q: 我的資料實際存放在哪裡？
faq.a: 你的專案檔案留在你的電腦上，備份副本可選 5 種自我託管位置：本機資料夾、隨身碟、NAS（SMB 路徑）、自架 Gitea、或 GitHub repo。Keeply 自家伺服器完全不接觸你的專案資料——只在授權驗證時收到雜湊過的裝置識別碼。
